ai_summary: Mahindra EPC Irrigation Ltd. announced the approval and release of its unaudited Q1 FY27 financial results, alongside significant governance enhancements. The company appointed Mr. Rajeev Goyal, a senior Mahindra Group executive, as Chairman and Mr. Vimal Agarwal as Internal Auditor, both bringing extensive financial and governance expertise from the parent organization. These strategic appointments signal a strengthening of leadership and internal controls, with no red flags indicated in the provided document.
